title: A Feast On The Train | Summary in Hindi | Class 6
description:
Few childhood moments carry the magic of eating on a moving train — and Sudha Murty's *A Feast on the Train* turns that simple joy into a quietly powerful lesson about generosity, assumption, and human connection. Prescribed in the Class 6 English curriculum, this story catches students off guard because what looks like a lighthearted travel tale slowly reveals something far more meaningful about kindness between strangers. If you've ever shared food with someone you didn't know, Sudha Murty will make you see that ordinary moment completely differently.
